process_name: LFV semileptonic charm decay D+ -> pi+ e mu
implementation_difficulty_reason: Needs a new Delta C = 1 charged-LFV semileptonic operator basis plus a D+ -> pi+ e mu mode calculation with form factors, phase-space acceptance, and chirality conventions.

commands: rg -n "epsilon_K|epsilon_k|Delta m_K|DELTA_M_K|evaluate_delta_mk|B_d|b_d|B_s|b_s|D0|d_mix|mu.?e.?gamma|muToEGamma|BR_LIMIT|MEG" quarkConstraints qcd flavorConstraints neutrinos yukawa warpConfig solvers scanParams tests -g '!*.ipynb'

rg -n "b.?->.?s|X_s|K\\*|R_K|R_D|B_s.*mu|pi.*nu|nu.*nubar|epsilon.?prime|eps.?prime|t.?->|Z.?->|h.?->|EDM|dipole|conversion|tau.?->|mu.?->.?3e" quarkConstraints qcd flavorConstraints neutrinos yukawa warpConfig solvers scanParams tests -g '!*.ipynb'

rg -n "D\\+.*pi\\+.*e.*mu|D\\^\\+.*pi\\^\\+.*e.*mu|D\\+.*pi\\+.*mu.*e|D\\^\\+.*pi\\^\\+.*mu.*e|pi\\+.*e\\+.*mu|pi\\+.*e-.*mu|semileptonic.*charm|rare.?charm|c.?->.?u.*e.*mu" quarkConstraints qcd flavorConstraints neutrinos yukawa warpConfig solvers scanParams tests -g '!*.ipynb'
evidence: Focused implementation-dir search for D+ -> pi+ e mu and rare semileptonic charm patterns returned no matches.
quarkConstraints/deltaf2.py:252 and quarkConstraints/deltaf2.py:941 are D0 mixing hits, not D+ -> pi+ e mu.
quarkConstraints/modern/phenomenology.py:23 and quarkConstraints/modern/phenomenology.py:668 are D0 mixing policy/evaluator hits, not rare semileptonic charm.
flavorConstraints/muToEGamma.py:75 is the separate mu -> e gamma LFV dipole check.

rs_baseline.use: Historical RS/anarchic-flavor baseline for the post-2008 comparison; no measured C008 observable is taken from this source.

status_history.reason: Initial PKA source extraction and C008 draft deposit.
Writer polish completed for wa_w5b_charm_edm; numerical claims checked against sidecar/source snapshots.
Checker verified CHK-1 through CHK-8 for ca_w5b_charm_edm.
Opus round 2 per-process sign-off; CA-verified PASS retained; see flavor_catalog/signoff/round_002_index.md.

status_history.notes: PDG, LHCb 2021, and BABAR predecessor D+ -> pi+ e mu limits verified.

sections.process:
\textbf{Standard notation:}
\(\mathcal{B}(D^+\to\pi^+e^+\mu^-)\) and
\(\mathcal{B}(D^+\to\pi^+e^-\mu^+)\).  This entry covers the two
opposite-sign charged-lepton-flavor-violating semileptonic charm decays
usually summarized as \(D^+\to\pi^+e^\pm\mu^\mp\).  Charge-conjugate
decays are implied by the experimental sources.
sections.pdg_prose:
The sidecar sources \texttt{PDG2026:DPlusPiEMuPlus} and
\texttt{PDG2026:DPlusPiEMuMinus}, PDG Live/API entries S031.110 and
S031.111 accessed on 2026-05-16, list separate 90\% C.L. upper limits:
\[
  \mathcal{B}(D^+\to\pi^+e^+\mu^-) < 2.1\times10^{-7},
  \qquad
  \mathcal{B}(D^+\to\pi^+e^-\mu^+) < 2.2\times10^{-7}.
\]
Both current limits come from \texttt{LHCb2021:DPlusPiEMu}, a search in
\(1.6\,{\rm fb}^{-1}\) of 2016 \(pp\) data.  The LHCb table gives companion
95\% C.L. limits of \(2.3\times10^{-7}\) and \(2.2\times10^{-7}\),
respectively.  The predecessor search \texttt{BaBar2011:RareForbiddenCharm},
using \(384\,{\rm fb}^{-1}\), reported 90\% C.L. limits of
\(2.9\times10^{-6}\) and \(3.6\times10^{-6}\).  These values are traced to
\texttt{flavor\_catalog/references/C008/pdg2026\_dplus\_piplus\_ep\_mum\_pdgLive.txt},
\texttt{pdg2026\_dplus\_piplus\_em\_mup\_pdgLive.txt},
\texttt{lhcb2021\_arxiv2011\_00217.txt}, and
\texttt{babar2011\_arxiv1107\_4465.txt}.
sections.relevance:
This process tests a product of up-sector flavor violation and charged-lepton
flavor violation: schematically, short-distance operators such as
\((\bar u\,\Gamma c)(\bar e\,\Gamma'\mu)\).  Minimal quark-only RS scans do
not generate a live constraint for this mode, but lepton-sector extensions
with nonuniversal KK gauge couplings, scalar exchange, or flavor-violating
brane terms can generate it.  It is therefore a useful catalog marker for a
future combined quark-plus-lepton flavor backend rather than a current veto.
sections.post_2008:
The arXiv:0804.1954 RS-flavor baseline
\texttt{CsakiFalkowskiWeiler2008:CompositeFlavor} predates the modern
rare/forbidden semileptonic charm searches.  BaBar
\texttt{BaBar2011:RareForbiddenCharm} subsequently set or improved limits for
charged-charm LFV modes in \(384\,{\rm fb}^{-1}\).  LHCb
\texttt{LHCb2021:DPlusPiEMu} searched for 25 rare and forbidden \(D^+\) and
\(D_s^+\) modes in 2016 data, found no significant deviation from background,
and tightened the two C008 charge channels to the present
\(2\times10^{-7}\)-level limits.
sections.validity:
The experimental limits are robust upper bounds on the listed exclusive
branching fractions.  Their interpretation as RS constraints is model
dependent because the mapping requires a \(\Delta C=1\), LFV semileptonic
operator basis, \(D\to\pi\) form factors, lepton-chirality assumptions, and a
phase-space treatment matching the LHCb analysis.  The Standard Model
background for charged-LFV final states is negligible for catalog purposes.
sections.code_coverage_prose:
\textbf{NO.}  The sidecar \texttt{code\_coverage} block records the required
coverage greps over \texttt{quarkConstraints/},
\texttt{qcd/}, \texttt{flavorConstraints/}, \texttt{neutrinos/},
\texttt{yukawa/}, \texttt{warpConfig/}, \texttt{solvers/},
\texttt{scanParams/}, and \texttt{tests/}, plus a focused search for
\texttt{D+.*pi+.*e.*mu}, \texttt{pi+.*e.*mu}, rare-charm, and
\texttt{c->u} LFV patterns, found no \(D^+\to\pi^+e^\pm\mu^\mp\)
implementation.  Nearby hits are unrelated: \(D^0\) mixing appears at
\texttt{quarkConstraints/deltaf2.py:252} and
\texttt{quarkConstraints/deltaf2.py:941}, the modern policy lists only
\(D^0\) mixing at \texttt{quarkConstraints/modern/phenomenology.py:23} and
\texttt{quarkConstraints/modern/phenomenology.py:668}, and the implemented
LFV observable is \(\mu\to e\gamma\) at
\texttt{flavorConstraints/muToEGamma.py:75}.
sections.implementation_difficulty_prose:
\textbf{HIGH.}  A production implementation needs a new \(\Delta C=1\)
LFV semileptonic operator basis and a \(D^+\to\pi^+e\mu\) branching-fraction
calculation with form factors, phase-space acceptance, and chirality
conventions.  This is beyond adding an input to the existing \(\Delta F=2\)
or \(\mu\to e\gamma\) paths.
sections.key_references:
Process-local keys before bibliography consolidation:
\texttt{PDG2026:DPlusPiEMuPlus}, \texttt{PDG2026:DPlusPiEMuMinus},
\texttt{LHCb2021:DPlusPiEMu}, \texttt{BaBar2011:RareForbiddenCharm}, and
\texttt{CsakiFalkowskiWeiler2008:CompositeFlavor}.

priority_rationale_short: LFV semileptonic charm is clean but weaker and non-generic.
priority_rationale_full:
D+->pi+e mu has negligible Standard Model background as an LFV final state,
but the limits are weaker and the RS interpretation needs both up-sector and
charged-lepton flavor violation. It is not a generic quark-scan veto and is
dominated by stronger muon LFV plus D-mixing constraints. Its role is mainly
auxiliary for specialized combined flavor models.
